data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the persona scenario regarding the 'Time-limited accept/decline window', but there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the functionality of this scenario. The linked use case outlines the need for an acceptance workflow, yet the evidence does not include any API reads or state checks that demonstrate this capability. Therefore, the requirement cannot be confirmed as satisfied, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of an acceptance workflow where substitutes can accept or decline offers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add acceptance workflow validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that substitutes can accept or decline offers through the API.
